calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Daniela Pederson the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Trae Stephens the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant, Defendant Daniela Pederson testifies on her own behalf.

Respondent, Plaintiff Trae Stephens testifies on his own behalf.

Witness Elena Aloman(mother), testifies on behalf of appellant.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded. (525)
